description: Product Description Welcome to share your decoration experiance with Tifuly! Advantages: The artificial hydrangea flowers are made silky fabric and durable plastic stem, no problem they can be reused, no waste money. 2 ways to use them:only using flower heads to DIY some big event scenes, create a flower ball, wedding chair decoration, flower arches, swing deocration,etc; attaching them with stems can easily make a table centerpieces, flower bouquets, etc. High quality and vibrant color, non-toxic and won't fade under the sun. 12 Pcs will meet your daily needs, valuable package quantity, if need more flower effect, please order 2 lots or more. Size: 1 Pc (with stem) total length approx: 12.2 inches/ 31cm, flower head 2.56 inches/ 6.5cm in diameter, 54 petals in each bloom. Material: Silk & fluffy flower heads, metal wire as skeleton is wrapped by plastic. Package: 12 Pcs artificial hydrangea flower heads + 12 Pcs stems ( in bulk). Fluffy and Elegant Home Vase Flowers Three pieces can make a simple table centerpieces, also very good looking, and cheaper than big stem hydrangea flowers.
